enumeratedConstants.name: TB_PROC_TIME
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Indicates time is processor cycle time. Not tied to external time

enumeratedConstants.name: TB_WORKSTATION_TIME
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Time as reported on workstation where software is running. For testing. (Required)

enumeratedConstants.name: TB_SC_TIME
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Time as reported by the spacecraft clock.

enumeratedConstants.name: TB_DONT_CARE
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Don't care value for sequences. If FwTimeBaseStoreType is changed, value should be changed (Required)

enumeratedConstants.name: START_SPI_FAIL
enumeratedConstants.annotation: FRAM_start failed because SPI driver init failed

enumeratedConstants.name: START_LOCK_CREATE_FAIL
enumeratedConstants.annotation: FRAM_start failed because semaphore/lock creation failed

enumeratedConstants.name: LOCK_FAIL
enumeratedConstants.annotation: FRAM operation failed because FRAM access lock could not be obtained

enumeratedConstants.name: INVALID_ARGUMENT
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Invalid input, null argument, out-of-range address, or invalid size

enumeratedConstants.name: TRANSFER_FAIL
enumeratedConstants.annotation: FRAM write or SPI transfer failed

enumeratedConstants.name: VERIFY_FAIL
enumeratedConstants.annotation: FRAM writeAndVerify failed because read-back data mismatched

enumeratedConstants.name: NOT_STARTED
enumeratedConstants.annotation: FRAM_start has not been called successfully

enumeratedConstants.name: SIZE_TOO_LARGE
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Requested size is larger than Fw.Buffer size

enumeratedConstants.name: UNKNOWN_ERROR
enumeratedConstants.annotation: Unexpected raw return code from low-level FRAM driver
